requirement_topic.en: Electrical Product Safety — WorkSafe / Energy Safety, RCM and AS/NZS IEC 61851
requirement_topic.zh: 电气产品安全——WorkSafe / Energy Safety、RCM及AS/NZS IEC 61851
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣產品安全——WorkSafe / Energy Safety、RCM及AS/NZS IEC 61851

summary.en: EV charging equipment supplied in New Zealand must meet New Zealand electrical product safety obligations administered by WorkSafe / Energy Safety. Suppliers should hold evidence for the final New Zealand product variant, including safety assessment to the AS/NZS IEC 61851 series or equivalent IEC evidence with New Zealand deviations reviewed, RCM / supplier declaration records where applicable, correct ratings, warnings, installation instructions, and traceable importer or supplier details.
summary.zh: 在新西兰供应的电动汽车充电设备须满足WorkSafe / Energy Safety管理的新西兰电气产品安全义务。供应商应持有最终新西兰产品型号的证据，包括按AS/NZS IEC 61851系列进行的安全评估，或附新西兰差异审查的等效IEC证据；适用时的RCM / 供应商声明记录；正确额定值、警示、安装说明，以及可追溯的进口商或供应商信息。
summary.zht: 在紐西蘭供應的電動汽車充電設備須滿足WorkSafe / Energy Safety管理的紐西蘭電氣產品安全義務。供應商應持有最終紐西蘭產品型號的證據，包括按AS/NZS IEC 61851系列進行的安全評估，或附紐西蘭差異審查的等效IEC證據；適用時的RCM / 供應商聲明記錄；正確額定值、警示、安裝說明，以及可追溯的進口商或供應商資訊。

standards_or_laws: WorkSafe New Zealand / Energy Safety electrical product safety regime
AS/NZS IEC 61851 series — Electric vehicle conductive charging system
RCM / supplier declaration evidence where applicable

summary.en: China-market EV chargers are commonly assessed to GB/T 18487.1-2023 and China domestic product certification rules, with China-specific voltage assumptions and GB/T 20234 connectors. China GB/T or CCC-style evidence may support engineering review but does not by itself demonstrate New Zealand product safety compliance for a Type 2 / CCS2, 230/400 V product variant.
summary.zh: 中国市场电动汽车充电桩通常按GB/T 18487.1-2023及中国国内产品认证规则评估，并采用中国电压假设和GB/T 20234接口。中国GB/T或CCC式证据可支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明采用Type 2 / CCS2、230/400 V的新西兰产品型号符合新西兰产品安全要求。
summary.zht: 中國市場電動汽車充電樁通常按GB/T 18487.1-2023及中國國內產品認證規則評估，並採用中國電壓假設和GB/T 20234接口。中國GB/T或CCC式證據可支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明採用Type 2 / CCS2、230/400 V的紐西蘭產品型號符合紐西蘭產品安全要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system
China domestic CCC / product safety certification rules where in scope

gap.en: Safety evidence gap: the New Zealand importer or supplier should maintain a technical file for the final NZ product, not the China domestic SKU. The file should cover AS/NZS IEC 61851 safety testing, Type 2 / CCS2 hardware, RCD and protective measures, 230/400 V ratings, installation manual, labelling, and any wireless or metering modules. China GB/T 18487.1 reports for a GB/T connector model should not be presented as complete New Zealand evidence.
gap.zh: 安全证据差距：新西兰进口商或供应商应为最终NZ产品建立技术文件，而非中国国内SKU。该文件应覆盖AS/NZS IEC 61851安全测试、Type 2 / CCS2硬件、RCD及保护措施、230/400 V额定值、安装手册、标签，以及任何无线或计量模块。针对GB/T接口型号的中国GB/T 18487.1报告不应被作为完整新西兰证据提交。
gap.zht: 安全證據差距：紐西蘭進口商或供應商應為最終NZ產品建立技術文件，而非中國國內SKU。該文件應覆蓋AS/NZS IEC 61851安全測試、Type 2 / CCS2硬體、RCD及保護措施、230/400 V額定值、安裝手冊、標籤，以及任何無線或計量模組。針對GB/T接口型號的中國GB/T 18487.1報告不應被作為完整紐西蘭證據提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical products and prescribed electrical work must meet New Zealand electrical safety law; RCM / supplier declaration evidence may be required depending on product category and supply route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic market where in scope; GB/T and China certification do not substitute for New Zealand evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat the New Zealand EV charger as a separate product variant. WorkSafe / Energy Safety expectations, AS/NZS IEC 61851 evidence, RCM / supplier declaration records where applicable, and New Zealand installation documentation must be assembled for the Type 2 / CCS2 and 230/400 V configuration. China GB/T evidence alone is incomplete.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将新西兰电动汽车充电桩视为独立产品型号。须围绕Type 2 / CCS2和230/400 V配置建立WorkSafe / Energy Safety要求、AS/NZS IEC 61851证据、适用的RCM / 供应商声明记录及新西兰安装文件。仅有中国GB/T证据是不完整的。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將紐西蘭電動汽車充電樁視為獨立產品型號。須圍繞Type 2 / CCS2和230/400 V配置建立WorkSafe / Energy Safety要求、AS/NZS IEC 61851證據、適用的RCM / 供應商聲明記錄及紐西蘭安裝文件。僅有中國GB/T證據是不完整的。
